TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Venezuela, title = Venezuela, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Venezuela} }

S.FORM: Venezuela u Venezuela sa i labu nu Cong-nan-mey-cuo, itiza i 8 00 N, 66 00 W u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 912,050 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 882,050 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 30,000 km2 hamin nu tademaw sa 30,912,302. kakalukan umah sa 24.50%, kilakilangan umah sa 52.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 23.40%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Caracas . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa 5 bulad 7 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci Nicol√°s Maduro, micakat a demiad sa i 2013 a mihca 4 bulad 19 demiad. likisi namahida, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela naw Indians (In'-ti-an a tademaw ŚćįÁ¨¨ŚģČšļļ) Arawak (A-la-waw-ke a binacadan ťėŅśčČÁď¶ŚÖčśóŹ) atu Caribbean (Cia-le-pi a binacadan Śä†ŚčíśĮĒśóŹ) a kakitidaan. cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku walu (1498) a mihcaan, Columbus (Ke-lun-pu Śď•ŚÄęŚłÉ) makaadih tu Venezuela (Winai-zuela ŚßĒŚÖßÁĎěśčČ). cacay a malebut lima a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1522) a mihcaan, Sipan-ya Ť•ŅÁŹ≠ÁČô) itini i Nanmea-cuo a sayaway kabulawan han i Sinka-tice nu aydaay a Vinai-zuela patideng. cacay a malebut pitu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu (1717) a mihcaan Sinke-zuy-nata fu-wan kitidaan patideng sa, Vinai-zuela pakenisen malasin. 1810ŚĻī4śúą19 . cacay a malebut walu a lasubu cacay a bataan (1810) a mihcaan sepat a bulad sabaw tu siwa a demiad nikasasumadan, Vinai-zuela miliyas tu Si-pan-ya anipikuwan, sisa itida i cacay a malebu walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay (1811) a mihcaan pitu a bulas lima a demiad mihapu misiteked kami sa, nika lepacawan caay pihedek. namaka pinatu a mihcaan nikalepacawan, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela itini i Namea-cuo singanganay misitekeday a tademaw ci Simon Bolivar (Si-Mun. puo-liwaw Ť•ŅŤíô¬∑ÁéĽŚą©Áď¶) pililidan, i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (1821) a mihcaan tatengan maala nu Si-pan-ya ku kapisitekedan katukuh tu caca a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan (1830) a mihcaan, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela atu Kelun-piya , Panama (Pa-na-ma Ś∑īśčŅť¶¨) atu Ecuador (E-kua-duo ŚéĄÁďúŚ§ö) nu tepalay a kanatal malecad, u Colombia (Take-lunpi-ya Ś§ßŚď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļě) kunhekuo. sa Vinai-zuela (Venezuela itini i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan (1830) a mihcaan misiteked a patideng, Colombia (Ta-ke-lun-pi-ya Ś§ßŚď•ŚÄęśĮĒšļě) mihaputu amabulasak sa. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan (1830) a mihcaan, mapatay satu ci Bolivar (Puo-li-waw ÁéĽŚą©Áď¶) , mimedmeday tu hitay a kakawaw ci Hesay. antun-niaw. pay-se mihapusa tu Vinai-zuela (Venezuela amiliyas tu Takelun-piya (Colombia misiteked. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay (1831) a mihcaan ci Pay-se mala Cungtun nu Vinai-zuela (Venezuela , pacici tu tademaw a cence, namaka labu kunipatalaw inai' sa ku lawat mikawan tu Vinai-zuela atu nudumaan a kanatal tu sakaudip, nikudan satu belinen nu hitay. ci Paydeluo.kaue.aysekandun pilalinzien mala Cungtun, tawyatu patideng tu Vinai-zuela kunhe-kuo , Vinai-zuela kunhe-kuo amica kuni patideng, tatenga inaitu ku tadatangah , mikuwanay tu kanatal uydatu umikuwanany, nikalawlawan a sakaudip mala mipataya tutademaw. . tusa satu a mihcaan ci Culi-an. kase-cu. kante'-lela-se mibabelihan patasasa'en cinida, misakaput ci Kante'-lela-se tu hitay a cen-fu, epingen ku kawaw, mapalekal ku Pawsuotan mibabelih, malingatu aca misapatas tu kawaw. sadikuday i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku siwa (1859) a mihcaan mapatideng tu lima a mihcaan kini kalepacawan. nina kalepacawan sadikuday ci Falcon (Fael-kun ś≥ēÁąĺŚ≠Ē) nililidan nida a hitay kumakaciay, kunhe-kuo mabelin, ci Falcon (Fael-kun ś≥ēÁąĺŚ≠Ē) mihapu patideng tu Vinai-zuela hecun-kuo , misabaluhay tu sinfa, sa lanpangen ku kawaw . Vinai-zuela i sabaw tu siwa (19) a se-ci atu tusa a bataan (20) a se-ci tu nupankiwan, hatidaay tu nutenes caay ka kapah, masasuada' ku cence atu micidekay a cence. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa (1952) a mihcaan tawya nu hitay a sakakaay ci Jimenez (Simen-neyse ŚłĆťĖÄŚÖßśĖĮ) a hitay patidengsa tu linziay a Cung-tun, belineng ku Vinai-zuela hecun-kuo , patideng tu aydaay a cen-cun . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku walu (1958) a mihcaan, mincu cuntun sadikuday pacicien nuheni ku hitay palusaliimeng nuheni amikaki tu kawaw nu kanatal. namakayda a mihcaan satu, sikiwentu ku sapalekal tu micu sifu mikawaw tu nuhitay a kawaw. 1998 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku walu (1998) a mihcaan ci Uke.cawi-se misadadas maala mala Vinai-zuela (Venezuela Cungtun. saka tusa a mihcaan nikala cungtungan malaheci nida ku sapisumad tu sinfa, naw lima a mihcaan kuni kala Cungtun paka tanayuen nida katukuh tu enemay a mihcaan, taneng miliyaw matulin kina cacayaca mala Cungtun. nikudan satau patideng tu baluhay a kuomin iyhua , kuohua naw tusaay a kawaw sumaden mala cacay, sapilebu tu mibelihay nu malumanay a kuohua. tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaa ci Uke.cawi-se nanisumadan satu ku nisingkiwan tu Cungtun u enemay a paya ku sakakina tusa nida maala Vinai-zuela (Venezuela Cungtun. tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan tulu a bulad pitu a demiad, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela kuomin-ihua mikedatu hata atu hata a kulit nipisumadan, pabalucu tu pituay a bunac cunusen mala walu a bunac, kulitay nu hata a subayu nuw kawanan sumaden pasiyda i kawili kunipibahel. sabaw tusa a bulad tulu a demiad, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela misinkiwan tu Cung-tun, ci UKe. Cawi-se u enemay a bataan idaw ku tulu (63%) a kilac nu paya malaheci matulin mala Cung-tun, u saka tulu nida amaala Vinai-zuela (Venezuela a Cung-tun.

amabulasak sa. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan (1830) a mihcaan, mapatay satu ci Bolivar (Puo-li-waw ÁéĽŚą©Áď¶) , mimedmeday tu hitay a kakawaw ci Hesay. antun-niaw. pay-se mihapusa tu Vinai-zuela (Venezuela amiliyas tu Takelun-piya (Colombia misiteked. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku cacay (1831) a mihcaan ci Pay-se mala Cungtun nu Vinai-zuela (Venezuela , pacici tu tademaw a cence, namaka labu kunipatalaw inai' sa ku lawat mikawan tu Vinai-zuela atu nudumaan a kanatal tu sakaudip, nikudan satu belinen nu hitay. ci Paydeluo.kaue.aysekandun pilalinzien mala Cungtun, tawyatu patideng tu Vinai-zuela kunhe-kuo , Vinai-zuela kunhe-kuo amica kuni patideng, tatenga inaitu ku tadatangah , mikuwanay tu kanatal uydatu umikuwanany, nikalawlawan a sakaudip mala mipataya tutademaw. . tusa satu a mihcaan ci Culi-an. kase-cu. kante'-lela-se mibabelihan patasasa'en cinida, misakaput ci Kante'-lela-se tu hitay a cen-fu, epingen ku kawaw, mapalekal ku Pawsuotan mibabelih, malingatu aca misapatas tu kawaw. sadikuday i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku siwa (1859) a mihcaan mapatideng tu lima a mihcaan kini kalepacawan. nina kalepacawan sadikuday ci Falcon (Fael-kun ś≥ēÁąĺŚ≠Ē) nililidan nida a hitay kumakaciay, kunhe-kuo mabelin, ci Falcon (Fael-kun ś≥ēÁąĺŚ≠Ē) mihapu patideng tu Vinai-zuela hecun-kuo , misabaluhay tu sinfa, sa lanpangen ku kawaw . Vinai-zuela i sabaw tu siwa (19) a se-ci atu tusa a bataan (20) a se-ci tu nupankiwan, hatidaay tu nutenes caay ka kapah, masasuada' ku cence atu micidekay a cence. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa (1952) a mihcaan tawya nu hitay a sakakaay ci Jimenez (Simen-neyse ŚłĆťĖÄŚÖßśĖĮ) a hitay patidengsa tu linziay a Cung-tun, belineng ku Vinai-zuela hecun-kuo , patideng tu aydaay a cen-cun . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku walu (1958) a mihcaan, mincu cuntun sadikuday pacicien nuheni ku hitay palusaliimeng nuheni amikaki tu kawaw nu kanatal. namakayda a mihcaan satu, sikiwentu ku sapalekal tu micu sifu mikawaw tu nuhitay a kawaw. 1998 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku walu (1998) a mihcaan ci Uke.cawi-se misadadas maala mala Vinai-zuela (Venezuela Cungtun. saka tusa a mihcaan nikala cungtungan malaheci nida ku sapisumad tu sinfa, naw lima a mihcaan kuni kala Cungtun paka tanayuen nida katukuh tu enemay a mihcaan, taneng miliyaw matulin kina cacayaca mala Cungtun. nikudan satau patideng tu baluhay a kuomin iyhua , kuohua naw tusaay a kawaw sumaden mala cacay, sapilebu tu mibelihay nu malumanay a kuohua. tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaa ci Uke.cawi-se nanisumadan satu ku nisingkiwan tu Cungtun u enemay a paya ku sakakina tusa nida maala Vinai-zuela (Venezuela Cungtun. tusa a malebut idaw ku enem (2006) a mihcaan tulu a bulad pitu a demiad, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela kuomin-ihua mikedatu hata atu hata a kulit nipisumadan, pabalucu tu pituay a bunac cunusen mala walu a bunac, kulitay nu hata a subayu nuw kawanan sumaden pasiyda i kawili kunipibahel. sabaw tusa a bulad tulu a demiad, Vinai-zuela (Venezuela misinkiwan tu Cung-tun, ci UKe. Cawi-se u enemay a bataan idaw ku tulu (63%) a kilac nu paya malaheci matulin mala Cung-tun, u saka tulu nida amaala Vinai-zuela (Venezuela a Cung-tun.
